hooks.prompt: The user is about to spawn an agent. Check the agent description field: '$ARGUMENTS'. Before allowing, verify: does this agent's prompt clearly state what UNIQUE signal it will produce that existing agents haven't? If the prompt describes a role/persona on the same model as other active agents (e.g. 'strategist' and 'red team' both on Claude), flag it — persona diversity is theater, model diversity is real. Allow if: different model, different information source, or clearly unique task. Block with a one-line explanation if it looks like a duplicate perspective.

The user is about to call noesis_research (~$0.40). Check '$ARGUMENTS': would noesis_search (~$0.006) or noesis_ask (~$0.01) answer this question? research is only justified for deep multi-source investigation that cheaper tiers can't handle. If search or ask would suffice, block with: 'Use noesis_search ($0.006) or noesis_ask ($0.01) instead — 60x cheaper. Reserve research for questions needing deep multi-source investigation.'

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd_full=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); branch=$(git -C "$cwd_full" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'no-git'); cwd=$(echo "$cwd_full" | sed "s|^$HOME|~|"); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name' | sed 's/Claude //'); usage=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.current_usage'); if [ "$usage" != "null" ]; then current=$(echo "$usage" | jq '.input_tokens + .cache_creation_input_tokens + .cache_read_input_tokens'); size=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.context_window_size'); pct=$((current * 100 / size)); printf '%s (%s) · %s · %d%%' "$(basename "$cwd")" "$branch" "$model" "$pct"; else printf '%s (%s) · %s' "$(basename "$cwd")" "$branch" "$model"; fi
